# A'POSH BIZHUB — AI Context File
# https://dominicling.github.io/aposh-bizhub/

## What this site is
A'POSH BIZHUB is a 7-storey B1 industrial building located at 11 Yishun Industrial Street 1, Singapore 768089. It has 454 factory units across 7 floors, built in 2013, with a 60-year leasehold tenure. The developer is OKH Global Ltd.

## Who this site is for
- Visitors and delivery drivers looking for the address, map, and directions
- People searching for a specific business or tenant in the building
- Property investors and tenants looking to buy or rent industrial units
- Business owners researching the building before signing a lease

## Key facts about A'POSH BIZHUB
- Address: 11 Yishun Industrial Street 1, Singapore 768089
- Type: B1 industrial (light industrial, no heavy manufacturing)
- Total units: 454
- Floors: 7
- Year built: 2013
- Tenure: 60-year leasehold
- Developer: OKH Global Ltd
- Nearest MRT: Yishun MRT (NS13) — approx 10 min walk
- Also near: Canberra MRT (NS12), Khatib MRT (NS14)
- Floor loading: 7.5 kN/sqm
- Ceiling height: ~5m
- Power supply: 3-phase
- Lift access: 4 passenger + 1 service + 6 cargo lifts
- Loading bays: Available
- 24-hour access: Yes

## Current tenants (as of 2026)
The building has 44 known tenants spanning industries including:
- Software development and IT
- Healthcare and dental
- Interior design
- Logistics and trading
- Photography and videography
- Construction and renovation
- F&B and food services

Notable tenants include: SEA (Software Engineering Asia), Cordlife Group Limited, MSC Consulting, Le Posh Design, Enterprise Bizpat, AKL Technology Engineering, Datalink Connect, SSG Business Centre, and more.

## Property market (units for sale and rent)
- Units for sale: 13 listings on CommercialGuru (S$750K–S$2.08M, PSF S$691–S$860)
- Units for rent: 35 listings on CommercialGuru (S$550–S$4,600/mo, PSF S$2.63–S$7.64/mo)
- Sale listings: https://www.commercialguru.com.sg/find-commercial-properties/property-for-sale/at-a-posh-bizhub-21297
- Rent listings: https://www.commercialguru.com.sg/find-commercial-properties/property-for-rent?includeProjects=1&propertyId=21297

## Nearby amenities
- Food: Soon Hong Eating House (on-site), A'POSH BIZHUB Canteen (on-site), Junction Nine food court, Yishun Park Hawker Centre
- Shopping: Junction Nine (1.8km), Northpoint City (2km), 1 More Square Food Court
- Hawker: Blk 925 Yishun Ave 9 Hawker Stalls, Blk 272 Yishun Ave 6

## How to get here
- By MRT: Yishun MRT (NS13), exit and take a short bus or walk
- By bus: Services 59, 59B, 56201 from Northland Secondary School area; 59008, 56250 from Yishun Avenue 6; 56201, 56009 from Changfu Primary School area
- By car: Via Yishun Industrial Street 1 off Yishun Ave 2 / SLE
